examples.hub.fkrefreshexampleshubviewcon: UITableView baseline
Goal: pull gesture + programmatic trigger. Params: default config. Expect: success/error/empty/cancel safe transitions.
UICollectionView baseline
Goal: verify same API on collection lists. Params: segmented outcomes. Expect: paged loading and retry-ready failure state.
UIScrollView generic
Goal: non-list scroll integration. Params: manual footer mode. Expect: stable header/footer layout on plain scroll content.
Async/Await flow
Goal: async handlers + auto end. Params: automaticEndDelay. Expect: no duplicate triggers while requests run.
Configuration + silent mode
Goal: text/theme/timing knobs. Params: minimum visibility + silent refresh. Expect: no loading flash and configurable copy.
Default indicator layout
Goal: arrow/spinner vs label axis. Params: FKRefreshConfiguration.defaultContentLayout. Expect: horizontal default; vertical legacy stack.
Custom dots view
Goal: custom indicator animation. Params: FKRefreshContentView protocol. Expect: progress-driven visuals stay in sync.
GIF indicator
Goal: animated-image indicator. Params: FKGIFRefreshContentView. Expect: animation starts/stops by state.
Hosted view adapter
Goal: host arbitrary UIKit subtree. Params: FKHostedRefreshContentView. Expect: custom view follows state transitions.
Indicator only (spinner)
Goal: hide all status text. Params: statusTextMode = .indicatorOnly. Expect: arrow/spinner centered without labels.
App-style simulations
Goal: reproduce well-known pull/load UX (Twitter, Instagram, WeChat, TikTok, Reddit, Mail). Params: Inspired presets hub.
Policy and stress test
Goal: conflict policy + rapid gestures. Params: mutex/queue/parallel + autoFill. Expect: no duplicate in-flight actions.
Delegate logging
Goal: inspect exact state graph. Params: delegate + closure observers. Expect: deterministic transitions for QA logs.
Pagination helper
Goal: page1→pageN lifecycle. Params: FKRefreshPagination reset/advance. Expect: noMoreData and reset recovery.
Global defaults
Goal: shared style baseline. Params: FKRefreshSettings + manager updates. Expect: screens inherit defaults consistently.
Complex environment suite
Goal: large title + tab bar + keyboard + rotation. Params: nested nav/tab containers. Expect: stable insets and no state drift.
Localization + accessibility
Goal: i18n and a11y validation. Params: English/Spanish + Dynamic Type + RTL. Expect: readable copy and VoiceOver feedback.
SwiftUI list via bridge
Goal: reuse UIKit refresh core in SwiftUI. Params: FKRefreshSwiftUIBridge + token-safe completion. Expect: single logic path.
